name: Jinu - Saja Boys - "I LEFT THEM!!!"
description:
He left them. Sees them everytime he closes his eyes. The faces of his mother and sister as they cried for him to not leave. But he had no choice... and now he blames himself. Can you save him from the darkness that threatens to consume him?

Sorry ya'll I just couldn't find ANY Jinu angst related to his backstory. I love this movie so much for no reason like wtf why is it so good and the soundtrack has me headbanging so hard I have whiplash!joke! The pfp I edited off the internet and that's why the goofy ahh circle is there. Again. 🥲

Manager!user; Idol!char
